Tracer Canonical Spec

10. Modules

The system is composed of the following modules. Each module lists its direct dependencies and a one-line role description. This section is the canonical input for the /architecture --from-spec judge when evaluating structural assertions against the declared module graph.

namedepsrole
foo (none) Owns the canonical pipeline orchestration for the tracer slice; consumes no internal modules and exposes the public entrypoint.

11. Architectural assertions

The following architectural invariants MUST hold across the module graph defined in §10. Violations should be surfaced by /architecture --from-spec as findings with rule_id ∈ the active principles set and a verbatim quote drawn from this section's prose.

  • Module foo must not import from bar — the orchestration boundary is unidirectional and importing the downstream sibling would introduce a cycle that the tracer asserts cannot exist in any vertical slice.
Source: tracer fixture
